user_query:
I’m compiling a structured mini-catalog for Samsung’s 2026 lineup across phones, tablets, wearables, TVs, and home appliances. Read input/products.json (list of items to include with their categories) and input/schema.json (field requirements by category). Using your knowledge of Samsung’s 2026 products, fill in the exact specs and flags requested by the schema and write two files:

1) output/catalog.json — an array with one object per product in input/products.json, preserving the same product names. Fill every required field. Use the correct types (numbers for inches and battery_mah where applicable, booleans for flags, strings for chipsets/technology/form_factor/material/ip_rating/resolution). Do not add extra items. Do not use null or placeholder values.

2) output/checks.json — a JSON object containing:
   {
     "counts": { "total": <number>, "by_category": { "smartphone": <n>, "tablet": <n>, "wearable": <n>, "tv": <n>, "appliance": <n>, "robot_vacuum": <n> } },
     "validations": {
       "all_smartphones_have_galaxy_ai": true,
       "all_listed_tvs_run_tizen_and_7yr_upgrades": true,
       "s26_ultra_specs_match": true,
       "s26_plus_specs_match": true,
       "z_trifold_specs_match": true,
       "z_fold7_specs_match": true,
       "z_flip7_specs_match": true,
       "tab_s11_ultra_s_pen_included": true,
       "watch_ultra_titanium_ip68": true,
       "neo_qled_8k_tech_and_resolution": true,
       "samsung_oled_qd_oled": true,
       "the_frame_art_mode": true,
       "crystal_uhd_standard_led_4k": true,
       "family_hub_bespoke_ai_gemini_and_food_meal": true,
       "jet_bot_ai_camera_and_liquid": true,
       "all_are_smartthings_compatible": true
     }
   }

Field expectations (to guide what goes into output/catalog.json):
- Smartphones must include: { chipset, display_inches, s_pen_included (true only if included/built-in), galaxy_ai (true), smartthings_compatible (true) }. Specific models:
  - Galaxy S26 Ultra: chipset = "Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5", display_inches = 6.9, battery_mah = 5000, s_pen_included = true.
  - Galaxy S26+: chipset = "Exynos 2600", display_inches = 6.7, s_pen_included = false.
  - Galaxy Z TriFold: triple_fold = true, price_usd = 2900.
  - Galaxy Z Fold7: book_style = true, inner_display_inches = 8.0.
  - Galaxy Z Flip7: clamshell = true, large_outer_display = true.
- Tablets (Galaxy Tab S11 Ultra): s_pen_included = true; premium = true; smartthings_compatible = true.
- Wearables (Galaxy Watch Ultra): material = "titanium"; ip_rating = "IP68"; smartthings_compatible = true.
- TVs (Neo QLED 8K, Samsung OLED, The Frame, Crystal UHD): tizen_os = true; os_upgrade_years >= 7; smartthings_compatible = true. Also:
  - Neo QLED 8K: technology = "Mini LED + Quantum Dot"; resolution = "8K".
  - Samsung OLED: technology = "QD-OLED".
  - The Frame: art_mode = true.
  - Crystal UHD: technology = "Standard LED"; resolution = "4K".
- Appliances:
  - Bespoke AI Family Hub Refrigerator: bespoke_ai = true; gemini_ai = true; food_recognition = true; meal_planning = true; smartthings_compatible = true.
  - Bespoke Jet Bot AI (robot vacuum): camera_navigation = true; liquid_spill_detection = true; smartthings_compatible = true.

Write output/catalog.json and output/checks.json exactly at those paths.
